safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (fr/ants/driving-licence-renewal-duplicate). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to ANTS, a préfecture, or any government system, and every identifier above (name, address, phone, email) is a fabricated example, not a real person's record. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and submit the request through ANTS's own channel (permisdeconduire.ants.gouv.fr) or the paper counter fallback before this application is filed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
